Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential customer who filled out the contact form.

nome.description: The full name of the lead.

telefone.description: The contact phone or WhatsApp number.

email.description: The email address of the lead.

mensagem.description: The Instagram handle or message provided by the lead.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the lead was created.

/leads/{leadId}.description: Collection of leads captured through the consulting form.
